title: 22nd Air Combat Wing

{{Quote|General Loorne and the two Jedi Knights he arrived with were ambushed and killed. Apparently no troopers among the Twenty-second staked a claim to the moral high ground.|Salvo, to Climber|<ref name="DL:TRoDV" />}}
The '''22nd Air Combat Wing''',<ref name="TCSWE" /> known simply as the '''Twenty-second''',<ref name="DL:TRoDV" /> was a [[Fighter wing/Legends|combat wing]]<ref name="TCSWE" /> of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] that fought during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. [[Ion Team]], a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Squad/Legends|squad]], was attached to the 22nd Air Combat Wing.<ref name="DL:TRoDV" />

Towards the end of the war, the 22nd Air Combat Wing operated out of<ref name="DL:TRoDV" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Boz Pity">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> [[Boz Pity/Legends|Boz Pity]], before moving to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] planet [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]]<ref name="DL:TRoDV" /> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> When [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was issued by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] on Murkhana, ordering all [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] to execute the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], the Twenty-second [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|ambushed]] and [[Death/Legends|killed]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Saras Loorne]] and two [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]].<ref name="DL:TRoDV" />

Later, [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Salvo (clone trooper)|Salvo]] reported the Twenty-second's actions to [[Clone Captain/Legends|Clone Captain]] [[Climber (clone)|Climber]], the leader of Ion Team, claiming that its members had apparently claimed no moral high ground from killing the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], as a snide remark towards Climber's moral questioning of Order 66.<ref name="DL:TRoDV" />

==Behind the scenes==
The 22nd Air Combat Wing first appeared as the "Twenty-second" in ''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'', a [[2005]] novel written by [[James Luceno]].<ref name="DL:TRoDV" /> The unit was later given its full official name in the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' reference book, written by [[Stephen J. Sansweet]] and [[Pablo Hidalgo]].<ref name="TCSWE" />
